zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Perrott於大約1226年出生在英國賀特福爾拉德維爾時，他的父親Ralph Perrott27歲，母親Joan Perrott22歲。他和Cassandra de Argentein至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1305年4月26日之前在英國英格蘭艾可林瑟爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Perrott于大约1226年出生在英国賀特福爾拉德維爾时，他的父亲Ralph Perrott27岁，母亲Joan Perrott22岁。他和Cassandra de Argentein至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1305年4月26日之前在英国英格兰艾可林瑟爾。

nameMeanings.name: Perrott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Welsh and Irish: variant of   Parrott  .
In some cases possibly also an altered form of French   Perrot  .

variants.name: Parrott
meanings: English: from a short form of the Middle English personal name Peres, Peris (from Old French Pierre; see Pearce ) + the diminutive suffixes -et, -ot.
English: habitational name from North Perrott in Somerset or South Perrott in Dorset (both named from the River Parret on which they stand, the etymology of which name is uncertain).
Altered form of French Parrot or of its variant Parot or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname, reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Perrott was born about 1226, in Radwell, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Ralph Perrott, was 27 and his mother, Joan Perrott, was 22. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Cassandra de Argentein. He died before 26 April 1305, in Lindsell, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Perrott est né environ 1226, à Radwell, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Perrott, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan Perrott, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Cassandra de Argentein. Il est décédé avant 26 avril 1305, à Lindsell, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, Unite: St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Perrott um 1226 in Radwell, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Perrott 27 und seine Mutter Joan Perrott 22. Er hatte mit Cassandra de Argentein mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 26. April 1305 in Lindsell, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Perrott è nato il circa 1226 nel Radwell, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph Perrott, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Joan Perrott, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Cassandra de Argentein. Morì prima del 26 aprile 1305, nel Lindsell, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Perrottが約1226年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアラドウエルで生まれた時，父Ralph Perrottは27歳，母Joan Perrottは22歳であった。彼はCassandra de Argenteinとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1305年4月26日以前にイギリスイギリスエセックスリンドセルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Perrott(이)가 대략 1226년 영국 허트퍼드실르 라드웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Perrott(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Perrott(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Cassandra de Argentein(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1305년 4월 26일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 린드셀에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Perrott nasceu aproximadamente 1226, em Radwell, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Perrott, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan Perrott, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Cassandra de Argentein. Ele faleceu antes 26 de abril de 1305, em Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Perrott родился около 1226 г. в местности радвелл, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Perrott было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Perrott, 22. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Cassandra de Argentein. Он умер перед 26 апрель 1305 г. в местности линдселл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
